notes: Modal max-height: 88vh → 85dvh (dynamic viewport height). 'vh' is the LARGEST possible viewport (with browser chrome collapsed). 'dvh' is the CURRENT visible viewport, so the modal respects address bar showing/hiding. This fixes the issue where Cancel/Save buttons were cut off below the visible screen edge even though they were within the logical viewport. Also tightened foot padding (16 → 12px + safe-area) so buttons sit higher above the screen edge.
